description: A stylized screenshot of a Truth Social / X post by 'Donald J. Trump @realDonaldTrump,' rendered as a clean white card with black sans-serif body text. The avatar is Trump's face with a blue/red American-flag overlay; a magenta verified checkmark and a black '+' subscription badge sit beside the name. Verbatim text: 'GOOD RIDDANCE! After 15 years of Dumocrats promising that "Climate Change" is going to destroy the Planet, the United Nations TOP Climate Committee just admitted that its own projections (RCP8.5) were WRONG! WRONG! WRONG! For far too long Climate Activism has been used by Dumocrats to scare Americans, push horrible Energy Polices, and fund BILLIONS into their bogus research programs. Unlike the Dumocrats, who use Climate Alarmism nonsense to push their GREEN NEW SCAM, my Administration will always be based on TRUTH, SCIENCE, and FACT! President DONALD J. TRUMP'. The messaging mocks climate science and Democrats ('Dumocrats'), reframes climate policy as a fraudulent 'GREEN NEW SCAM,' and claims the administration alone represents truth. Propaganda techniques: ridicule, repetition ('WRONG! WRONG! WRONG!'), us-vs-them framing, and appropriation of the language of 'science' and 'fact.' Target audience is the MAGA base and climate-policy skeptics.
notable_text: GOOD RIDDANCE! ... the United Nations TOP Climate Committee just admitted that its own projections (RCP8.5) were WRONG! WRONG! WRONG! ... their GREEN NEW SCAM... my Administration will always be based on TRUTH, SCIENCE, and FACT!
